---
title: "Prelim_HBCD_eda"
output: html_document
date: "2025-03-14"
---

```{r}
setwd("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Margaret/sex_mod_braincharts")
```

Incorporating preliminary HBCD data (pre-release) into LBCC v3  for growth charts

```{r, warning=FALSE}}
if(!require('pacman')) {
  install.packages('pacman')
}
pacman::p_load(data.table, ggplot2, tidyverse, stats, skimr, naniar, rlang, parallel, ggrepel, ggpubr)
```

```{r}
imaging_df <- fread("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Data/HBCD/HBCD_tabular_downloads/imaging/bibset_segmentation/data.csv", na.strings = c("", NA))
#names(imaging_df)
names(imaging_df)[grep("age", names(imaging_df))]
skim(imaging_df$img_mriqc_T2w_candidate_age)

imaging_df %>%
  select(all_of(names(imaging_df)[grep("age", names(imaging_df))])) %>%
  skim()

imaging_df_filt <- imaging_df %>%
  rename(age = img_mriqc_T2w_candidate_age) %>%
  dplyr::select(!any_of(starts_with("img_mriqc"))) #dropping qc for now, since this is just the beta release
```

```{r}
demo_df <- fread("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Data/HBCD/HBCD_tabular_downloads/nonimaging/demographics/DATA_CSV14096344619509598011.csv", na.strings = c("", NA))
#names(demo_df)
unique(demo_df$par_visit_data_par_visit_data_cohort)
unique(demo_df$par_visit_data_par_visit_data_project)

demo_sub <- demo_df %>%
  dplyr::select(id, visit_label, cohort, site, sed_basic_demographics_sed_basic_demographics_sex) %>%
  rename(sex = sed_basic_demographics_sed_basic_demographics_sex) %>%
  mutate(sex = ifelse(sex=="Unknown", NA, sex)) %>%
  na.omit()
```

Merge!
```{r}
hbcd <- inner_join(demo_sub, imaging_df_filt)
skim(hbcd)
```
